ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2026 Continued To Feb-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Dec-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NANCY YEE'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

Appearances: Jonathan Vaknin (415.851.5297) specially appearing on behalf of plaintiff; No other appearances.

Mr. Vaknin informs the court that plaintiff submitted a request for dismissal on December 5, 2025. The court modifies its ruling and takes the motion off calendar in light of the dismissal. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NANCY YEE's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

Defendant NY Ventures LLC's motion to quash service of summons is off calendar. The motion was filed by Nancy Yee on behalf of NY Ventures LLC, yet Ms. Yee is not a licensed California attorney and does not appear to be an attorney licensed in another state. Because NY Ventures LLC must be represented by a licensed California attorney (CLD Construction, Inc. v. City of San Ramon (2004) 120 Cal. App. 4th 1141, 1146) or an out-of-state attorney admitted pro hac vice, the motion is taken off calendar.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2025 Continued To Jan-27-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
